---
title: "Emily Synge"
---

## Emily Synge

**Dates:** (1835-1905)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

She was a Gosling as ‘Shamrock’ 1866/7, when her address was 3 Cranfield Villas/ 37 Oakley Square Chelsea.  She was daughter of the Rev. Edward Synge (1798-1859) perpetual curate of Trinity Church, Matlock, and Emily Steele; she seems to have lived with her brother, the Rev. Francis Synge (1837-98) curate of St. Luke's Chelsea.  The father had been chaplain to Bishop Barker of Sydney c. 1855 [IFR; <i>Alumni Cantabrigienses; Alumni Dublinenses</i>;  PO London 1864; Eton Lists]

### Letters

- Letter from Nov 20th [1868]
- Letter from Febry 18th [1868]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
